step_rationale: Ferroptosis suppression; lipid peroxide detoxification; atherosclerosis protection.
mechanism: GPX4 suppresses ferroptotic cell death and lipid peroxidation in atherosclerotic lesions and post-ischemic myocardium.

references.title: Peroxidized cholesterol in low density lipoprotein: Negative effects on human endothelial cells and atherogenic implications.
Xanthosine alleviates myocardial ischemia-reperfusion injury through attenuation of cardiomyocyte ferroptosis.
Comprehensive metagenomic and lipidomic analysis showed that baicalin could improve depressive behaviour in atherosclerotic mice by inhibiting nerve cell ferroptosis.
Integrating metagenomics, lipidomics and proteomics to explore the effect and mechanism of ginsenoside Rb1 on atherosclerosis co-depression disease.
references.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
